results.title: Wall Street Slumps, Dollar Jumps After Trump's Tariff Blitz: What's Moving Markets Monday?
results.author: Piero Cingari
results.description: President Trump announced 25% tariffs on all Japanese and South Korean imports starting August 1, causing stock markets to drop and the US dollar to surge amid rising trade tensions.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: ETF declined 1.02% due to market-wide sell-off from tariff announcements
ETF dropped 0.85% as markets reacted negatively to new trade tariffs
